jobs.title: Analyst, FP&A
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: VF Corporation is looking for an exceptional FP&A Analyst , Shared Functions to join our Finance team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s talk about the role! As FP&A Analyst, will support brand FP&A activities related to P&L Planning and Forecasting focusing on Sales & Margin of Wholesale channel, playing a key role to create alignment around Gross-To-Net, analysing the main channel and accounts dynamics and performances as well as supporting the brand to make the right decisions to maximize marginality. You will gather information on forecast & plan data, which has to be loaded in the reporting tool (BPC) and deliver reports, as determined by area leads and Senior Management. To achieve the goals of the department you will work closely together with your colleagues of the Finance department as well as other functions such as DTC, Planning, Sales and report directly to the Director, FP&A. We expect that you will deliver unbeatable results whilst fulfilling the following aspects of the FP&A Analyst role: - Manage and handle Financial GTN planning and Forecasting tools and ensure consistency and accuracy of figures submitted in the systems; - Ensure that actuals are aligned to expectations and proactively analyse and report variances vs forecast with - Keep continuous alignment between financial & commercial GTN to ensure alignment/balance between Sales, Margin and inventory targets; - Deliver forecasting accuracy excellence and pro-actively analyze any critical trends or dynamics within the channels and the main accounts; - Ensure that all recurring requests related to forecast and plan are delivered accurately and on time: store roll, key accounts details, revenue walk, margin bridge, category overviews, etc.; - Support the 5YR rolling financial plan (LRP) partnering with the global strategy, global merch planning & Ops and Product. Understand the brand strategy and support in drawing conclusions through financial analysis; - Assist in ad-hoc analysis on request of European or Global/Corporate management Skills for Success You will be a professional with proven experience in business controlling and financial planning, with a strong analytical mindset and: - Minimum bachelor’s degree in finance area (accounting, controlling) and 1/2 years of related work experience preferrable; - Solid software and PC skills (Advanced in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP/COGNOS, BPC experience is a plus) - Great time management and prioritizing skills with the ability to meet strict deadlines - Strong English command (written and verbal) - Proven communication skills in interacting with people from a non-financial background - Excellent organizational skills & goal-oriented About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It’s the reason we come to work every day. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com What’s in it For You We’re in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That’s why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we’re the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - A discount card with 50% on all VF brands - Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. R-20260323-0032

descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione VF Corporation is looking for an exceptional FP&A Analyst , Shared Functions to join our Finance team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s talk about the role! As FP&A Analyst, will support brand FP&A activities related to P&L Planning and Forecasting focusing on Sales & Margin of Wholesale channel, playing a key role to create alignment around Gross-To-Net, analysing the main channel and accounts dynamics and performances as well as supporting the brand to make the right decisions to maximize marginality. You will gather information on forecast & plan data, which has to be loaded in the reporting tool (BPC) and deliver reports, as determined by area leads and Senior Management. To achieve the goals of the department you will work closely together with your colleagues of the Finance department as well as other functions such as DTC, Planning, Sales and report directly to the Director, FP&A. We expect that you will deliver unbeatable results whilst fulfilling the following aspects of the FP&A Analyst role: ## Mansioni - Manage and handle Financial GTN planning and Forecasting tools and ensure consistency and accuracy of figures submitted in the systems; - Ensure that actuals are aligned to expectations and proactively analyse and report variances vs forecast with - Keep continuous alignment between financial & commercial GTN to ensure alignment/balance between Sales, Margin and inventory targets; - Deliver forecasting accuracy excellence and pro-actively analyze any critical trends or dynamics within the channels and the main accounts; - Ensure that all recurring requests related to forecast and plan are delivered accurately and on time: store roll, key accounts details, revenue walk, margin bridge, category overviews, etc.; - Support the 5YR rolling financial plan (LRP) partnering with the global strategy, global merch planning & Ops and Product. Understand the brand strategy and support in drawing conclusions through financial analysis; - Assist in ad-hoc analysis on request of European or Global/Corporate management ## Requisiti - Minimum bachelor’s degree in finance area (accounting, controlling) and 1/2 years of related work experience preferrable; - Solid software and PC skills (Advanced in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP/COGNOS, BPC experience is a plus) - Great time management and prioritizing skills with the ability to meet strict deadlines - Strong English command (written and verbal) - Proven communication skills in interacting with people from a non-financial background - Excellent organizational skills & goal-oriented ## Cosa offriamo - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - A discount card with 50% on all VF brands - Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks ## Contatto R-20260323-0032
descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione VF Corporation sta cercando un eccezionale analista FP&A , Shared Functions per unirsi al nostro team di finanza con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. Parliamo del ruolo! Come analista FP&A, supporterà le attività di FP&A del marchio relative alla pianificazione e previsione del P&L concentrandosi sulle vendite e sul margine del canale Wholesale, giocando un ruolo chiave nella creazione di allineamento intorno al Gross-To-Net, analizzando le dinamiche e le prestazioni dei principali canali e conti nonché supportando il marchio per prendere le giuste decisioni per massimizzare la marginalità. Raccoglierà informazioni sui dati di previsione e pianificazione, che devono essere caricati nel tool di reporting (BPC) e consegnare rapporti, come determinato dai responsabili dell'area e dal Senior Management. Per raggiungere gli obiettivi del reparto, lavorerà a stretto contatto con i colleghi del reparto Finanza nonché con altre funzioni come DTC, Pianificazione, Vendite e riferirà direttamente al Direttore, FP&A. Ci aspettiamo che consegni risultati eccezionali mentre adempie ai seguenti aspetti del ruolo di analista FP&A: ## Mansioni - Gestire e gestire gli strumenti di pianificazione e previsione finanziaria GTN e garantire la coerenza e l'accuratezza delle cifre inserite nei sistemi; - Garantire che i dati effettivi siano allineati alle aspettative e analizzare e segnalare proattivamente le variazioni rispetto alla previsione con - Mantenere un allineamento continuo tra finanziario e commerciale GTN per garantire l'allineamento / equilibrio tra vendite, margine e obiettivi di inventario; - Consegnare l'eccellenza dell'accuratezza delle previsioni e analizzare proattivamente le tendenze o dinamiche critiche all'interno dei canali e dei conti principali; - Garantire che tutte le richieste ricorrenti relative a previsioni e piani siano consegnate in modo accurato e in tempo: roll store, dettagli conti chiave, passeggiata entrate, ponte margine, panoramica categoria, ecc.; - Supportare il piano finanziario a 5 anni (LRP) che lavora con la strategia globale, la pianificazione globale della merce e le operazioni e il prodotto. Comprendere la strategia del marchio e supportare nel trarre conclusioni attraverso l'analisi finanziaria; - Assistere nell'analisi ad hoc su richiesta della gestione europea o globale / aziendale ## Requisiti - Laurea minima in area finanziaria (contabilità, controllo) e 1/2 anni di esperienza lavorativa correlata preferibile; - Solid skills software e PC (avanzato in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP / COGNOS, esperienza BPC è un plus) - Ottime capacità di gestione del tempo e di priorità con la capacità di rispettare scadenze rigorose - Forte comando inglese (scritto e verbale) - Competenze di comunicazione comprovate nell'interagire con persone di un background non finanziario - Eccellenti capacità organizzative e orientate agli obiettivi ## Cosa offriamo - Una cultura basata su feedback di supporto in cui il rispetto e l'integrità ci guidano in ciò che facciamo - Un ambiente internazionale inclusivo in cui le persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità amano lavorare insieme - Essere parte di un marchio di lifestyle iconico in un'organizzazione multi-marca e multi-paese - Palestra in loco che offre iniziative di salute e benessere - Una carta sconto con il 50% su tutti i marchi VF - Aree di ritrovo che offrono bevande calde gratuite ## Contatto R-20260323-0032
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung VF Corporation sucht einen außergewöhnlichen FP&A-Analysten , Shared Functions, um unser Finanzielles Team mit Sitz in Stabio, Schweiz, zu unterstützen. Lass uns über die Rolle sprechen! Als FP&A-Analyst werden Sie die FP&A-Aktivitäten des Markenbereichs in Bezug auf P&L-Planung und -Prognose unterstützen, wobei der Schwerpunkt auf den Verkäufen und der Marge des Großhandelskanals liegt. Sie spielen eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Schaffung von Übereinstimmung um Gross-To-Net, analysieren die Dynamik und Leistung der wichtigsten Kanäle und Konten sowie unterstützen die Marke bei der richtigen Entscheidungsfindung, um die Marginalität zu maximieren. Sie werden Informationen über Prognose- und Planungsdaten sammeln, die in das Berichtstool (BPC) geladen werden müssen, und Berichte liefern, wie von den Bereichsleitern und dem Senior Management festgelegt. Um die Ziele der Abteilung zu erreichen, werden Sie eng mit Ihren Kollegen der Finanzabteilung sowie mit anderen Funktionen wie DTC, Planung, Vertrieb zusammenarbeiten und direkt an den Direktor, FP&A, berichten. Wir erwarten, dass Sie außergewöhnliche Ergebnisse liefern und dabei die folgenden Aspekte der FP&A-Analystenrolle erfüllen: ## Aufgaben - Verwaltung und Handhabung von Financial GTN-Planungs- und Prognose-Tools und Sicherstellung der Konsistenz und Genauigkeit der in den Systemen eingereichten Zahlen; - Sicherstellen, dass die Ist-Werte mit den Erwartungen übereinstimmen und proaktiv analysieren und berichten über Abweichungen gegenüber der Prognose mit - Kontinuierliche Übereinstimmung zwischen finanziell und kommerziell GTN, um die Übereinstimmung / Balance zwischen Umsatz, Marge und Lagerzielen sicherzustellen; - Lieferung von Prognose-Genauigkeitsexzellenz und proaktive Analyse von kritischen Trends oder Dynamiken innerhalb der Kanäle und Haupt Konten; - Sicherstellen, dass alle wiederkehrenden Anforderungen in Bezug auf Prognose und Planung genau und rechtzeitig geliefert werden: Store-Rollen, wichtige Kontodetails, Umsatzspaziergang, Marge-Brücke, Kategorieübersichten usw.; - Unterstützung des 5-jährigen rollierenden Finanzplans (LRP) in Partnerschaft mit der globalen Strategie, der globalen Merch-Planning & Ops und dem Produkt. Verstehen der Markenstrategie und Unterstützung bei der Ziehung von Schlussfolgerungen durch Finanzanalyse; - Unterstützung bei Ad-hoc-Analysen auf Anfrage der europäischen oder globalen / Unternehmensleitung ## Anforderungen - Mindestens Bachelor-Abschluss in Finanzbereich (Rechnungswesen, Controlling) und 1/2 Jahre relevante Berufserfahrung; - Solide Software- und PC-Kenntnisse (fortgeschritten in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP / COGNOS, BPC-Erfahrung ist ein Plus) - Gute Zeitmanagement- und Prioritätsfähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, strikte Fristen einzuhalten - Starke Englischkenntnisse (schriftlich und mündlich) - Nachweisbare Kommunikationsfähigkeiten bei der Interaktion mit Personen aus einem nichtfinanziellen Hintergrund - Hervorragende organisatorische Fähigkeiten und zielorientiert ## Was bieten wir - Eine unterstützende Feedback-basierte Kultur, in der Respekt und Integrität uns bei unserer Arbeit leiten - Eine inklusive internationale Umgebung, in der Menschen mit unterschiedlichem Hintergrund, Lebensstil und Nationalität gerne zusammenarbeiten - Teil eines ikonischen Lifestyle-Markenunternehmens in einer Multi-Marken-, Multi-Länder-Organisation - Vor-Ort-Fitnessstudio mit Gesundheits- und Wellness-Initiativen - Eine Rabattkarte mit 50% auf alle VF-Marken - Pausenbereiche mit kostenlosen heißen Getränken ## Kontakt R-20260323-0032
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description VF Corporation recherche un analyste FP&A exceptionnel , Shared Functions pour rejoindre notre équipe de finance basée à Stabio, Suisse. Parlons du rôle ! En tant qu'analyste FP&A, vous soutiendrez les activités FP&A de la marque liées à la planification et aux prévisions de P&L en mettant l'accent sur les ventes et la marge du canal de gros, jouant un rôle clé pour créer un alignement autour de Gross-To-Net, en analysant les dynamiques et les performances des principaux canaux et comptes ainsi qu'en aidant la marque à prendre les bonnes décisions pour maximiser la marginalité. Vous collecterez des informations sur les données de prévision et de planification qui doivent être chargées dans l'outil de reporting (BPC) et livrerez des rapports, comme déterminé par les responsables de la zone et la direction supérieure. Pour atteindre les objectifs du département, vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec vos collègues du département financier ainsi qu'avec d'autres fonctions telles que DTC, Planification, Ventes et rendrez compte directement au directeur, FP&A. Nous attendons de vous que vous livriez des résultats exceptionnels tout en remplissant les aspects suivants du rôle d'analyste FP&A : ## Tâches - Gérer et gérer les outils de planification et de prévision financière GTN et garantir la cohérence et l'exactitude des chiffres soumis dans les systèmes; - Assurer que les données réelles sont alignées sur les attentes et analyser et signaler de manière proactive les écarts par rapport à la prévision avec - Maintenir un alignement continu entre les aspects financiers et commerciaux GTN pour garantir l'alignement / l'équilibre entre les ventes, la marge et les objectifs de stock; - Livrer une excellence en matière de précision des prévisions et analyser de manière proactive les tendances ou dynamiques critiques au sein des canaux et des principaux comptes; - Assurer que toutes les demandes récurrentes liées aux prévisions et aux plans sont livrées avec précision et à temps: roulement des magasins, détails des comptes clés, promenade des revenus, pont de marge, vues d'ensemble de la catégorie, etc.; - Soutenir le plan financier à 5 ans (LRP) en partenariat avec la stratégie mondiale, la planification mondiale de la marchandise et les opérations et le produit. Comprendre la stratégie de la marque et soutenir la prise de conclusions grâce à l'analyse financière; - Assister à l'analyse ad hoc à la demande de la direction européenne ou mondiale / des entreprises ## Exigences - Diplôme minimum de licence en domaine financier (comptabilité, contrôle) et 1/2 an d'expérience professionnelle connexe; - Compétences solides en logiciel et en PC (avancées en Excel, PowerPoint, SAP / COGNOS, expérience BPC est un plus) - Excellentes compétences en gestion du temps et en priorisation avec la capacité de respecter des délais stricts - Commande forte de l'anglais (écrit et oral) - Compétences de communication prouvées pour interagir avec des personnes d'un contexte non financier - Compétences organisationnelles exceptionnelles et orientées vers les objectifs ## Ce que nous offrons - Une culture basée sur un feedback de soutien où le respect et l'intégrité nous guident dans ce que nous faisons - Un environnement international inclusif où les personnes de divers horizons, de styles de vie et de nationalités aiment travailler ensemble - Faire partie d'une marque de lifestyle iconique dans une organisation multi-marques et multi-pays - Salle de sport sur place offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Une carte de réduction avec 50% sur toutes les marques VF - Aires de repos offrant des boissons chaudes gratuites ## Contact R-20260323-0032

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Allocator intern to join VANS within VF EMEA Internship Program. In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team: - By taking an active role in analysing performance and sales trend. - Monitoring deliveries, maintaining adequate stock levels. - Taking care of replenishment / initial allocation for O&O EMEA Stores. - Developing and maintaining reports and tools finding the best way to make them efficient and useful for the team. How you will make a difference You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being: - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Passionate for numbers with strong analytical skills: accuracy and attention to details is a must. - Proficient in Microsoft Excel. Knowledge of any BI platform will be considered as a plus (eg: Power BI). - Eager to learn and face up new challenges. - Proactive in order to achieve yours and your team goals. - First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Learn about Vans’ trends and main logics of Retail Merchandising. - Learn logics of inventory management, sales analysis, and allocation strategies. - Learn to work with a wide team of internal stakeholder. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram nella nostra sede EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera come Tirocinante Allocatore per Vans. VF sta ridefinendo cosa significa essere la migliore azienda di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature al mondo, potenziando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com . ## Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1 giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, full-time - Salario lordo mensile: 1’850 CHF - Luogo: Sede EMEA di VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di reclutamento semplificato: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenziale Business Case) ## Requisiti di idoneità - Devi laurearti dopo il 1 maggio 2026 O devi avere lo status di studente a partire da giugno 2026 - Devi possedere la cittadinanza UE o EEA (European Economic Area) ## Mansioni Parliamo del ruolo! Cerchiamo un tirocinante Allocatore da inserire in VANS all'interno del Programma di Stage EMEA di VF. In questo ruolo, fornirai supporto al Team di Allocazione: - Partecipando attivamente all'analisi delle prestazioni e delle tendenze di vendita. - Monitorando le consegne, mantenendo livelli di stock adeguati. - Curando il riassortimento / allocazione iniziale per i negozi O&O EMEA. - Sviluppando e mantenendo report e strumenti trovando il modo migliore per renderli efficienti e utili per il team. ## Requisiti Come farai la differenza Devi essere un giocatore di squadra analitico, resiliente e curioso, essendo: - Fluente in inglese con eccellenti capacità di comunicazione verbale e scritta. - Appassionato di numeri con forti capacità analitiche: precisione e attenzione ai dettagli sono indispensabili. - Competente in Microsoft Excel. - La conoscenza di qualsiasi piattaforma BI sarà considerata un plus (es: Power BI). - Desideroso di imparare e affrontare nuove sfide. - Proattivo per raggiungere i tuoi e i tuoi obiettivi di squadra. - Prime esperienze come altri stage, attività extracurriculari, sono considerate un plus ## Cosa offriamo Cosa c'è per te Alla fine del periodo di stage, puoi aspettarti di avere una chiara comprensione di quanto segue: - Imparare le tendenze di Vans e le logiche principali del Retail Merchandising. - Imparare le logiche della gestione dell'inventario, analisi delle vendite e strategie di allocazione. - Imparare a lavorare con un ampio team di stakeholder interni. Il Programma di Stage EMEA di VF è un viaggio di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e potenziare i talenti emergenti all'inizio delle loro carriere. Siamo impegnati a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e un'esperienza pratica ricca, inclusi: - Workshop dedicati allo sviluppo delle competenze e progetto di gruppo di consulenza interna - Un giorno di lavoro in negozio per ottenere reali approfondimenti sui nostri marchi - Opportunità di networking con colleghi e leadership senior Non possiamo garantire che lo stage ti porterà a un contratto successivo, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri stagisti rimane nella società dopo il periodo di stage. Poiché vogliamo che tu ti concentri su ciò che conta, offriamo benefici completi che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Potrai godere di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - 50% di sconto sui marchi VF - Palestra in loco, offrendo iniziative per la salute e il benessere - Mensa sovvenzionata, oltre a zone di pausa con bevande gratuite - Autobus navetta per l'ufficio o sconto sui trasporti pubblici, a seconda della tua posizione - Una comunità di stagisti fiorente, con persone di background, stili di vita e nazionalità diversi che amano lavorare insieme. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging Come datore di lavoro con pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a promuovere una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, sulla connessione, sull'apertura e sull'autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un luogo di lavoro che celebra la diversità dei nostri collaboratori, permettendo loro di portare la loro autenticità al lavoro ogni giorno. ## Contatto Se sei interessato?
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Sei ein Träumer, mach den Unterschied! Schließe dich dem #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-HQ in Stabio, Schweiz als Allocator-Praktikant für Vans an. VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das weltweit beste Bekleidungs-, Schuh- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen zu sein, und unterstützt ikonische aktive Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland®. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com . ## Schlüsselinfos - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1’850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz - Vereinfachter Rekrutierungsprozess: 3 Interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenzielles Business Case) ## Zulassungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 promovieren O du musst zum Juni 2026 einen Studentenstatus haben - Du musst EU- oder EEA-Staatsangehörigkeit besitzen ## Aufgaben Lass uns über die Rolle sprechen! Wir suchen einen Allocator-Praktikanten, der VANS im Rahmen des VF EMEA Internship Program einbindet. In dieser Rolle wirst du dem Allocation Team Unterstützung bieten: - Durch aktive Analyse von Performance und Verkaufstrends. - Durch Überwachung von Lieferungen, Aufrechterhaltung angemessener Lagerbestände. - Durch Pflege der Nachschub/erste Allocation für O&O EMEA Stores. - Durch Entwicklung und Pflege von Reports und Tools, um die effizienteste und nützlichste Lösung für das Team zu finden. ## Anforderungen Wie du einen Unterschied machst Du solltest ein analytischer, belastbarer und neugieriger Teamplayer sein, indem du: - Fließend Englisch mit exzellenten mündlichen und schriftlichen Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - Leidenschaft für Zahlen mit starken analytischen Fähigkeiten: Genauigkeit und Detailgenauigkeit sind ein Muss. - Versiert in Microsoft Excel. - Kenntnisse einer BI-Plattform werden als Plus gewertet (z. B.: Power BI). - Neugierig zu lernen und neue Herausforderungen anzunehmen. - Proaktiv, um deine und die Teamziele zu erreichen. - Erste Erfahrungen wie andere Praktika, außerschulische Aktivitäten werden als Plus gewertet. ## Was wir bieten Was gibt es für dich Am Ende des Praktikums kannst du erwarten, ein klares Verständnis von folgendem zu haben: - Lernen über die Trends von Vans und die Hauptlogik des Retail Merchandising. - Lernen über die Logik des Bestandsmanagements, Verkaufsanalyse und Allokationsstrategien. - Lernen, mit einem breiten Team interner Stakeholder zu arbeiten. Das VF EMEA Internship Program ist eine 12‑monatige Reise, die darauf ausgelegt ist, aufstrebende Talente zu entwickeln und zu stärken. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, dein Potenzial freizusetzen, sodass du einen strukturierten Lernweg und reichhaltige praktische Erfahrungen erwarten kannst, einschließlich: - Dedizierte Workshops zur Kompetenzentwicklung & internes Consulting-Projekt - Einen Tag Arbeit im Laden, um echte Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Netzwerkgelegenheiten mit Kollegen und Führungskräften Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Praktikum zu einem Vertrag danach führt, aber dank des Wertes der Erfahrung bleiben die meisten unserer Praktikanten nach dem Praktikumszeitraum im Unternehmen. Da wir möchten, dass du dich auf das Wesentliche konzentrierst, bieten wir umfassende Leistungen, die geistiges, körperliches und finanzielles Wohlbefinden fördern. Du wirst genießen: - Hybridarbeitsregelung - 50 % Rabatt auf VF-Marken - On‑Site‑Fitnessstudio, das Gesundheits- und Wellnessinitiativen anbietet - Subventionierte Kantine sowie Pausenbereiche mit kostenlosen Getränken - Shuttlebus zum Büro oder Rabatt auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach Standort - Eine florierende Community von Praktikanten, mit Menschen unterschiedlicher Hintergründe, Lebensstile und Nationalitäten, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging Als Arbeitgeber mit Chancengleichheit streben wir danach, eine Kultur des Zugehörigkeitsgefühls zu fördern, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir setzen uns dafür ein, einen Arbeitsplatz zu schaffen und zu erhalten, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter feiert und ihnen ermöglicht, jeden Tag ihre authentische Persönlichkeit einzubringen. ## Kontakt Bist du dabei? Bewirb dich jetzt – frühzeitige Bewerbung erhöht deine Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Soyez un rêveur, faites la différence ! Rejoignez le #VFInternshipProgram dans notre siège EMEA à Stabio, Suisse, en tant que Stagiaire Alloueur pour Vans. VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise mondiale de vêtements, chaussures et équipements, en soutenant des marques de style de vie actif emblématiques telles que The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com . ## Informations clés - Date de début : 1 juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire brut mensuel : 1 850 CHF - Lieu : Siège EMEA de VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Responsable du recrutement, cas d’affaires potentiel) ## Conditions d’éligibilité - Vous devez obtenir votre diplôme après le 1 mai 2026 OU vous devez avoir le statut d’étudiant à partir de juin 2026 - Vous devez être citoyen de l’UE ou de l’EEE (Espace économique européen) ## Missions Parlons du rôle ! Nous recherchons un stagiaire Alloueur pour rejoindre VANS dans le cadre du Programme de Stage EMEA de VF. Dans ce rôle, vous apporterez votre soutien à l’équipe d’allocation : - En prenant un rôle actif dans l’analyse des performances et des tendances de vente. - En surveillant les livraisons, en maintenant des niveaux de stock adéquats. - En prenant soin du réapprovisionnement / allocation initiale pour les magasins O&O EMEA. - En développant et en maintenant des rapports et des outils, en trouvant la meilleure façon de les rendre efficaces et utiles pour l’équipe. ## Exigences Comment vous ferez la différence Vous devez être un joueur d’équipe analytique, résilient et curieux, étant : - Fluide en anglais avec d’excellentes compétences en communication verbale et écrite. - Passionné par les chiffres avec de fortes compétences analytiques : précision et attention aux détails sont indispensables. - Maîtrise de Microsoft Excel. - La connaissance d’une plateforme BI sera considérée comme un plus (ex : Power BI). - Désireux d’apprendre et de relever de nouveaux défis. - Proactif afin d’atteindre vos objectifs et ceux de votre équipe. - Les premières expériences telles que d’autres stages, activités extrascolaires, sont considérées comme un plus ## Ce que nous offrons Qu’est‑ce qu’il y a pour vous À la fin de la période de stage, vous pouvez vous attendre à avoir une compréhension claire de ce qui suit : - Apprendre les tendances de Vans et les logiques principales du Retail Merchandising. - Apprendre les logiques de gestion des stocks, d’analyse des ventes et des stratégies d’allocation. - Apprendre à travailler avec une large équipe de parties prenantes internes. Le Programme de Stage EMEA de VF est un parcours de 12 mois conçu pour développer et autonomiser les talents émergents au début de leur carrière. Nous nous engageons à libérer votre potentiel, vous pouvez donc vous attendre à un parcours d’apprentissage structuré et à une expérience pratique riche, incluant : - Ateliers dédiés au développement des compétences & projet de groupe de conseil interne - Un jour de travail en magasin pour obtenir des aperçus réels sur nos marques - Opportunités de réseautage avec des pairs et des dirigeants seniors Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage vous conduira à un contrat par la suite, mais grâce à la valeur de l’expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l’entreprise après la période de stage. Comme nous voulons que vous vous concentriez sur l’essentiel, nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent le bien‑être mental, physique et financier. Vous profiterez de : - Politique de travail hybride - 50 % de remise sur les marques VF - Gym sur place, offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien‑être - Cantine subventionnée, ainsi que des espaces de pause proposant des boissons gratuites - Navette vers le bureau ou remise sur les transports publics, selon votre localisation - Une communauté d’étudiants en stage florissante, avec des personnes de divers horizons, styles de vie et nationalités qui aiment travailler ensemble. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging En tant qu’employeur offrant l’égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture d’appartenance fondée sur le respect, la connexion, l’ouverture et l’authenticité. Nous nous engageons à construire et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos collaborateurs, leur permettant d’apporter leur authenticité au travail chaque jour. ## Contact Vous êtes partant ? Postulez maintenant – une candidature anticipée augmente vos chances ! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

jobs.title: Retail Marketing Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Marketing Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! This internship offers hands-on experiences at the intersection of marketing and retail, where you’ll help shape in-store activations while learning how brand strategy comes to life at the point of sale Support the planning and execution of retail marketing initiatives that enhance in-store visibility, customer engagement, and sales performance. Gain experience analyzing results, coordinating with cross-functional teams, and translating brand strategy into impactful retail activations. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail Marketing intern: - Support the planning and execution of retail marketing and in-store activations, helping bring Vans’ brand, culture, and stories to life in stores. - Coordinate with cross-functional teams (Retail, Creative, Visual Merchandising, and other Marketing functions) to gather all tactics needed to deliver engaging in-store events and consumer activations. - Assist with retail marketing operations across EMEA, supporting different store formats (Owned, Partner, Outlet). - Contribute to training and communication materials for store teams ahead of key activations or events. - Help execute retail campaigns and store activations, including in-store visuals, digital retail communications, and event-related materials. - Provide day-to-day support on cross-functional needs, such as copy coordination, translations, and event logistics. - Work closely with DTC (Direct To Consumer) Retail teams (district and store managers) to support smooth execution at store level. - Support the creation of briefs and post-activation recaps, capturing learnings and best practices for future in-store initiatives. - Support basic budget tracking and purchase order follow-up in coordination with the team. Skills that will make you successful You are a natural facilitator who helps ideas turn into real, on-the-ground experiences: - Project-minded and well-organized – You enjoy working in project mode, juggling multiple activations, and coordinating across Creative, Retail, Visual Merchandising, and Marketing teams. - Curious about retail marketing and in-store activations – You’re eager to understand how brand storytelling, consumer experience, and store execution come together in a physical retail environment. - Culturally connected – You have a strong eye for engaging content and a genuine affinity with action sports, street culture, and the Vans DNA (skate, music, art, and self-expression). - Detail-driven yet hands-on – You care about quality, follow through on execution, and take pride in getting the small details right for events and store activations. - Proactive and solution-oriented -You show initiative, adapt quickly, and keep things moving even when plans evolve or challenges arise. - Collaborative by nature – You thrive in team environments, share information openly, and contribute positively to collective success. - Comfortable working with data and tools – You enjoy using tools like Excel and PowerPoint to track projects, support reporting, and tell clear, visual stories. - A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business, or a related field is nice to have, but we are most interested in your mindset, curiosity, and relevant experiences. What’s in it for you By joining the Vans Retail Marketing team, you’ll gain real, hands-on experience working on in-store activations and events for an iconic global action sports brand. During your internship, you will: - Work closely with international and cross-functional teams across Retail, Marketing, Creative, and Visual Merchandising. - Contribute to real retail activations and in-store events, from idea to execution. - Learn how brand strategy translates into physical retail experiences that engage consumers. - Receive exposure to retail marketing operations across EMEA, including different store formats. - Benefit from on-the-job learning, mentoring, and collaboration with experienced professionals in the industry. By the end of the internship, you can expect to have a clear understanding of: - How retail marketing and in-store activations are planned, executed, and measured. - How cross-functional teams collaborate to deliver impactful store experiences. - How Vans’ brand values and action-sports culture are expressed at retail level. - The operational side of retail marketing, including asset production, timelines, and budget basics. - What it takes to successfully deliver consumer-facing events in a fast-paced retail environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0013

descriptionByLocale.en: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Marketing Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! This internship offers hands-on experiences at the intersection of marketing and retail, where you’ll help shape in-store activations while learning how brand strategy comes to life at the point of sale Support the planning and execution of retail marketing initiatives that enhance in-store visibility, customer engagement, and sales performance. Gain experience analyzing results, coordinating with cross-functional teams, and translating brand strategy into impactful retail activations. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail Marketing intern: - Support the planning and execution of retail marketing and in-store activations, helping bring Vans’ brand, culture, and stories to life in stores. - Coordinate with cross-functional teams (Retail, Creative, Visual Merchandising, and other Marketing functions) to gather all tactics needed to deliver engaging in-store events and consumer activations. - Assist with retail marketing operations across EMEA, supporting different store formats (Owned, Partner, Outlet). - Contribute to training and communication materials for store teams ahead of key activations or events. - Help execute retail campaigns and store activations, including in-store visuals, digital retail communications, and event-related materials. - Provide day-to-day support on cross-functional needs, such as copy coordination, translations, and event logistics. - Work closely with DTC (Direct To Consumer) Retail teams (district and store managers) to support smooth execution at store level. - Support the creation of briefs and post-activation recaps, capturing learnings and best practices for future in-store initiatives. - Support basic budget tracking and purchase order follow-up in coordination with the team. Skills that will make you successful You are a natural facilitator who helps ideas turn into real, on-the-ground experiences: - Project-minded and well-organized – You enjoy working in project mode, juggling multiple activations, and coordinating across Creative, Retail, Visual Merchandising, and Marketing teams. - Curious about retail marketing and in-store activations – You’re eager to understand how brand storytelling, consumer experience, and store execution come together in a physical retail environment. - Culturally connected – You have a strong eye for engaging content and a genuine affinity with action sports, street culture, and the Vans DNA (skate, music, art, and self-expression). - Detail-driven yet hands-on – You care about quality, follow through on execution, and take pride in getting the small details right for events and store activations. - Proactive and solution-oriented -You show initiative, adapt quickly, and keep things moving even when plans evolve or challenges arise. - Collaborative by nature – You thrive in team environments, share information openly, and contribute positively to collective success. - Comfortable working with data and tools – You enjoy using tools like Excel and PowerPoint to track projects, support reporting, and tell clear, visual stories. - A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business, or a related field is nice to have, but we are most interested in your mindset, curiosity, and relevant experiences. What’s in it for you By joining the Vans Retail Marketing team, you’ll gain real, hands-on experience working on in-store activations and events for an iconic global action sports brand. During your internship, you will: - Work closely with international and cross-functional teams across Retail, Marketing, Creative, and Visual Merchandising. - Contribute to real retail activations and in-store events, from idea to execution. - Learn how brand strategy translates into physical retail experiences that engage consumers. - Receive exposure to retail marketing operations across EMEA, including different store formats. - Benefit from on-the-job learning, mentoring, and collaboration with experienced professionals in the industry. By the end of the internship, you can expect to have a clear understanding of: - How retail marketing and in-store activations are planned, executed, and measured. - How cross-functional teams collaborate to deliver impactful store experiences. - How Vans’ brand values and action-sports culture are expressed at retail level. - The operational side of retail marketing, including asset production, timelines, and budget basics. - What it takes to successfully deliver consumer-facing events in a fast-paced retail environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0013

jobs.title: CRM & Loyalty Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as CRM & Loyalty Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Vans is looking for a curious and driven CRM & Loyalty Intern to support how we engage, reward, and grow our consumer community across EMEA, based in Stabio, Switzerland. Support the execution of Vans’ CRM and Loyalty strategy across EMEA, contributing to how we engage our community, strengthen loyalty, and bring the Vans brand to life through meaningful, data‑driven consumer experiences. You will gain hands‑on exposure to lifecycle marketing, loyalty mechanics, and cross‑functional collaboration within a global, youth‑culture‑driven brand. - Support the execution of CRM campaigns across email, eCommerce, and other consumer touchpoints, ensuring brand consistency and flawless delivery - Contribute to the setup, monitoring, and optimization of loyalty activations to drive engagement, retention, and member value - Manage and update CRM assets such as campaign calendars, briefs, tracking files, and dashboards to support day‑to‑day execution - Be responsible for supporting reporting and post‑campaign analysis, helping translate consumer and performance data into clear insights - Develop a strong understanding of the Vans consumer, community mindset, and lifecycle stages by working closely with EMEA and Central teams - Support additional ad-hoc digital media initiatives and projects as part of the wider Vans Brand Planning team How you will make a difference What will make you successful in this role: - A strong passion for the Vans brand, youth culture, and community‑driven marketing, with curiosity about how brands build long‑term relationships - A genuine interest in CRM, loyalty programs, and data‑informed decision‑making, beyond just campaign execution - An analytical mindset, with the ability to connect performance data to consumer behavior and brand impact - High attention to detail and structure, essential for managing multiple campaigns and stakeholders in parallel - A proactive, hands‑on attitude, comfortable working in a fast‑moving, international environment and learning by doing - A degree in Marketing, Business, Economics, Data, or a related field is nice to have What’s in it for you In the role of CRM & Loyalty Intern , you will work at the heart of Vans’ consumer engagement strategy, gaining hands‑on experience in how a global youth‑culture brand builds long‑term relationships with its community. By joining our team, you will: - Gain practical experience in CRM, loyalty, and lifecycle marketing , working on real campaigns that reach millions of consumers across EMEA - Learn how to translate consumer data and insights into meaningful actions that drive engagement, retention, and brand love - Develop a strong understanding of Vans Family , loyalty mechanics, and how community‑driven brands create value beyond transactions - Work closely with an international, cross‑functional team , collaborating with Brand, Digital, eCommerce, and Central CRM teams - Build confidence using industry‑leading tools and processes , with exposure to campaign execution, reporting, and performance optimization - Benefit from a supportive learning environment, including on‑the‑job coaching, feedback, and networking opportunities across teams and brands within VF This internship is a unique opportunity to learn by doing, grow your skill set, and contribute to shaping how Vans connects with its community — always "Off The Wall". The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0012
