descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram nella nostra sede EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera, come CRM & Loyalty Intern per Vans. Su di noi VF sta ridefinendo cosa significa essere la migliore azienda di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature al mondo, alimentando marchi attivi come The North Face?, Vans? e Timberland?. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com. ## Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1? giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, tempo pieno - Salario mensile lordo: 1'850 CHF - Luogo: Sede EMEA VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di reclutamento semplificato: 3 interviste (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, Business Case potenziale) ## Requisiti di ammissibilità - Devi essere in corso di laurea dopo il 1? maggio 2026 O DEVI avere uno status di studente a giugno 2026 - Devi avere la cittadinanza dell'UE o dell'Area Economica Europea ## Mansioni Vans sta cercando un CRM & Loyalty Intern curioso e motivato per supportare come si impegna, si ricompensa e si cresce la nostra comunità di consumatori across EMEA, basato a Stabio, Svizzera. Supporta l'esecuzione della strategia CRM e di lealtà di Vans across EMEA, contribuendo a come si impegna la nostra comunità, si rafforza la lealtà e si porta la marca Vans alla vita attraverso esperienze significative, guidate dai dati dei consumatori. Acquisirai una conoscenza di prima mano delle strategie di marketing di ciclo di vita, delle meccaniche di lealtà e della collaborazione interfunzionale all'interno di un marchio globale, guidato dalla cultura giovanile. - Supporta l'esecuzione delle campagne CRM across email, eCommerce e altri punti di contatto dei consumatori, assicurando la coerenza della marca e la consegna impeccabile - Contribuisci alla configurazione, al monitoraggio e all'ottimizzazione delle attivazioni di lealtà per stimolare l'impegno, la conservazione e il valore dei membri - Gestisci e aggiorni gli asset CRM come calendari delle campagne, brevi, file di tracciamento e dashboard per supportare l'esecuzione quotidiana - Sii responsabile del supporto alla relazione e all'analisi post-campagna, aiutando a tradurre i dati dei consumatori e delle prestazioni in chiari insight - Sviluppa una solida comprensione del consumatore Vans, della mentalità della comunità e delle fasi di ciclo di vita lavorando in stretta collaborazione con le squadre EMEA e Central - Supporta iniziative di media digitali aggiuntive e progetti come parte della squadra di pianificazione della marca Vans ## Requisiti Cosa ti renderà un successo in questo ruolo: - Una forte passione per la marca Vans, la cultura giovanile e il marketing comunitario guidato, con curiosità su come le marche costruiscono relazioni a lungo termine - Un genuino interesse per il CRM, i programmi di lealtà e la presa di decisioni informata dai dati, oltre alla semplice esecuzione delle campagne - Un mindset analitico, con la capacità di connettere i dati di prestazione ai comportamenti dei consumatori e all'impatto della marca - Alta attenzione ai dettagli e struttura, essenziali per gestire più campagne e stakeholder in parallelo - Un atteggiamento proattivo, di prima mano, comodo nel lavorare in un ambiente internazionale veloce e imparare facendo - Una laurea in Marketing, Business, Economia, Dati o un campo correlato è piacevole avere ## Cosa offriamo Nel ruolo di CRM & Loyalty Intern, lavorerai al cuore della strategia di impegno dei consumatori di Vans, acquisendo una conoscenza di prima mano di come un marchio giovanile globale costruisce relazioni a lungo termine con la sua comunità. Unendoci, acquisirai: - Una conoscenza pratica del CRM, della lealtà e del marketing di ciclo di vita, lavorando su campagne reali che raggiungono milioni di consumatori across EMEA - Impari a tradurre i dati dei consumatori e gli insight in azioni significative che stimolano l'impegno, la conservazione e l'amore della marca - Sviluppa una solida comprensione della famiglia Vans, delle meccaniche di lealtà e di come le marche comunitarie creano valore al di là delle transazioni - Lavora in stretta collaborazione con una squadra internazionale e interfunzionale, collaborando con la marca, il digitale, eCommerce e le squadre CRM centrali - Costruisci la tua fiducia nell'utilizzo di strumenti e processi di industria leader, con esposizione all'esecuzione delle campagne, alla relazione e all'ottimizzazione delle prestazioni - Beneficia di un ambiente di apprendimento supportivo, incluso l'allenamento sul lavoro, il feedback e le opportunità di rete all'interno delle squadre e delle marche all'interno di VF Questo internato è un'opportunità unica per imparare facendo, crescere il tuo set di abilità e contribuire a determinare come Vans si connette con la sua comunità - sempre "Fuori dalle mura". Il Programma di Internato EMEA di VF è un viaggio di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e dare potere a talenti emergenti all'inizio della loro carriera. Siamo impegnati a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e una ricca esperienza di prima mano, inclusa: - Lavori di costruzione delle abilità dedicate & gruppo di consulenza interna - Un giorno di lavoro in negozio per acquisire una conoscenza reale dei nostri marchi - Opportunità di rete con pari e leadership senior Non possiamo garantire che l'internato porterà a un contratto successivo, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri interni rimane nella società dopo il periodo di internato. Poiché vogliamo che tu ti concentri su ciò che conta, offriamo benefici completi che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Godrai di: - Politica di lavoro ibrida - Sconto del 50% sui marchi VF - Palestra in loco, offrendo iniziative di salute e benessere - Cucina sussidiata, nonché aree di pausa offrendo bevande gratuite - Bus navetta per la sede o sconto sul trasporto pubblico, a seconda della tua ubicazione - Comunità di interni fiorita, con persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità che amano lavorare insieme. ## Libero di essere, Inclusione e appartenenza Come datore di lavoro uguale, ci impegniamo a creare una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, la connessione, l'apertura e l'autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un luogo di lavoro che celebra la diversità dei nostri associati, consentendo loro di portare le loro autentiche storie al lavoro ogni giorno. ## Contatto Sei pronto? Clicca qui per applicare - l'anticipazione aumenta le tue possibilità! #readytoapply R-20260206-0012
descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as CRM & Loyalty Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . ## Informazioni chiave - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) ## Requisiti di ammissibilità - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship ## Mansioni Vans is looking for a curious and driven CRM & Loyalty Intern to support how we engage, reward, and grow our consumer community across EMEA, based in Stabio, Switzerland. Support the execution of Vans’ CRM and Loyalty strategy across EMEA, contributing to how we engage our community, strengthen loyalty, and bring the Vans brand to life through meaningful, data‑driven consumer experiences. You will gain hands‑on exposure to lifecycle marketing, loyalty mechanics, and cross‑functional collaboration within a global, youth‑culture‑driven brand. - Support the execution of CRM campaigns across email, eCommerce, and other consumer touchpoints, ensuring brand consistency and flawless delivery - Contribute to the setup, monitoring, and optimization of loyalty activations to drive engagement, retention, and member value - Manage and update CRM assets such as campaign calendars, briefs, tracking files, and dashboards to support day‑to‑day execution - Be responsible for supporting reporting and post‑campaign analysis, helping translate consumer and performance data into clear insights - Develop a strong understanding of the Vans consumer, community mindset, and lifecycle stages by working closely with EMEA and Central teams - Support additional ad-hoc digital media initiatives and projects as part of the wider Vans Brand Planning team ## Requisiti What will make you successful in this role: - A strong passion for the Vans brand, youth culture, and community‑driven marketing, with curiosity about how brands build long‑term relationships - A genuine interest in CRM, loyalty programs, and data‑informed decision‑making, beyond just campaign execution - An analytical mindset, with the ability to connect performance data to consumer behavior and brand impact - High attention to detail and structure, essential for managing multiple campaigns and stakeholders in parallel - A proactive, hands‑on attitude, comfortable working in a fast‑moving, international environment and learning by doing - A degree in Marketing, Business, Economics, Data, or a related field is nice to have ## Cosa offriamo In the role of CRM & Loyalty Intern , you will work at the heart of Vans’ consumer engagement strategy, gaining hands‑on experience in how a global youth‑culture brand builds long‑term relationships with its community. By joining our team, you will: - Gain practical experience in CRM, loyalty, and lifecycle marketing , working on real campaigns that reach millions of consumers across EMEA - Learn how to translate consumer data and insights into meaningful actions that drive engagement, retention, and brand love - Develop a strong understanding of Vans Family , loyalty mechanics, and how community‑driven brands create value beyond transactions - Work closely with an international, cross‑functional team , collaborating with Brand, Digital, eCommerce, and Central CRM teams - Build confidence using industry‑leading tools and processes , with exposure to campaign execution, reporting, and performance optimization - Benefit from a supportive learning environment, including on‑the‑job coaching, feedback, and networking opportunities across teams and brands within VF This internship is a unique opportunity to learn by doing, grow your skill set, and contribute to shaping how Vans connects with its community — always "Off The Wall". The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. ## Contatto Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0012
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Sei ein Traum, mach einen Unterschied! Join #VFInternshipProgram in unserer EMEA-Zentrale in Stabio, Schweiz, als CRM & Loyalty-Praktikant für Vans. Über VF VF definiert, was es bedeutet, die weltbeste Bekleidungs-, Schuh- und Ausrüstungsgesellschaft zu sein, indem wir ikonische Aktivlebensstilmarken wie The North Face?, Vans? und Timberland? antrieben. Erfahren Sie mehr auf http://vfc.com. ## Hauptsächliche Informationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1'850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA-Zentrale in Stabio, Schweiz - Verkürzter Rekrutierungsprozess: 3 Interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenzieller Business Case) ## Zulassungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 abgeschlossen haben oder du musst als Student anerkannt sein - Du musst EU- oder EWR-Bürgerschaft besitzen ## Aufgaben Vans sucht einen motivierten und engagierten CRM & Loyalty-Praktikanten, um zu unterstützen, wie wir unsere Verbrauchercommunity in EMEA, basierend in Stabio, Schweiz, engagieren, belohnen und wachsen lassen. Unterstütze die Umsetzung der CRM- und Loyalitätsstrategie von Vans in EMEA, indem du beiträgst, wie wir unsere Community engagieren, die Loyalität stärken und die Marke Vans durch bedeutsame, datengetriebene Verbrauchererfahrungen zum Leben bringen. Du wirst eine erste Hand an die Strategien des Lebenszyklus-Marketings, der Loyalitätsmechanismen und der interfunzionalen Zusammenarbeit in einem globalen, jugendkulturellen Markenunternehmen gewinnen. - Unterstütze die Umsetzung von CRM-Kampagnen über E-Mail, E-Commerce und andere Verbraucherkontaktstellen, um die Markeinkonsistenz und die fehlerfreie Lieferung sicherzustellen - Beiträge zur Einrichtung, zum Monitoring und zur Optimierung von Loyalitätsaktivitäten, um die Beteiligung, die Bindung und den Mitgliederwert zu steigern - Verwalte und aktualisiere CRM-Assets wie Kampagnenkalender, Briefe, Tracking-Dateien und Dashboards, um die tägliche Umsetzung zu unterstützen - Sei verantwortlich für die Unterstützung der Berichterstattung und der postkampagnen Analyse, um die Verbraucher- und Leistungsdaten in klare Einblicke umzuwandeln - Entwickle eine solide Verständnis des Vans-Verbrauchers, der Community-Mentalität und der Lebenszyklusphasen, indem du eng mit den EMEA- und Zentralteams zusammenarbeitest - Unterstütze zusätzliche ad-hoc-Digital-Medieninitiativen und Projekte als Teil der breiteren Vans-Brand-Planning-Team ## Anforderungen Was wird dich in diesem Rolle erfolgreich machen: - Eine starke Leidenschaft für die Marke Vans, die Jugendkultur und den community-getriebenen Marketing, mit Neugier auf, wie Marken langfristige Beziehungen aufbauen - Echte Interesse an CRM, Loyalitätsprogrammen und datengetriebenen Entscheidungsfindungen, über die einfache Kampagnenverwaltung hinaus - Analytischer Denkansatz, mit der Fähigkeit, Leistungsdaten mit Verbraucherverhalten und Markeinfluss zu verbinden - Hohe Aufmerksamkeit auf Details und Struktur, unerlässlich für die Verwaltung mehrerer Kampagnen und Stakeholder in parallelen - Proaktiver, erste Hand-Ansatz, bequem im internationalen, schnellen Umfeld und lernen durch Handeln - Ein Studium in Marketing, Business, Ökonomie, Daten oder einem verwandten Bereich ist schön ## Was wir bieten Als CRM & Loyalty-Praktikant wirst du am Herzen der Vans-Verbraucherengagementstrategie arbeiten, eine erste Hand an die Strategien des Lebenszyklus-Marketings, der Loyalitätsmechanismen und der interfunzionalen Zusammenarbeit in einem globalen, jugendkulturellen Markenunternehmen gewinnen. Indem du dich unserem Team anschließt, wirst du: - Eine praktische Erfahrung in CRM, Loyalitäts- und Lebenszyklus-Marketing, indem du an realen Kampagnen arbeitest, die Millionen von Verbrauchern in EMEA erreichen - Lernen, wie man Verbraucherdaten und Einblicke in bedeutsame Aktionen umwandelt, die die Beteiligung, die Bindung und die Marke-Liebe steigern - Eine solide Verständnis der Vans-Familie, der Loyalitätsmechanismen und wie community-getriebene Marken Wert über Transaktionen hinaus schaffen - In enger Zusammenarbeit mit einem internationalen, interfunzionalen Team arbeiten, zusammenarbeiten mit Marke, Digital, E-Commerce und Zentral-CRM-Teams - Vertrauen in die Verwendung von Branchenführern und Prozessen aufbauen, mit Zugang zu Kampagnenverwaltung, Berichterstattung und Leistungsoptimierung - Vom unterstützenden Lernumfeld profitieren, einschließlich des Lernens am Arbeitsplatz, des Feedbacks und der Netzwerkmöglichkeiten innerhalb der Teams und Marken innerhalb von VF Dieses Praktikum bietet eine einzigartige Gelegenheit, durch Handeln zu lernen, dein Fähigkeitsspektrum zu erweitern und mitzubestimmen, wie Vans mit seiner Community in Kontakt tritt - immer "Außerhalb der Mauern". Das EMEA-Praktikumsprogramm von VF ist ein 12-Monats-Weg, der darauf abzielt, Talente zu entwickeln und zu stärken, die am Anfang ihrer Karriere stehen. Wir sind verpflichtet, dein Potenzial zu entfesseln, also kannst du erwarten, einen strukturierten Lernweg und eine reiche erste Hand-Erfahrung, einschließlich: - Dedicierter Fähigkeitsschulungen & interner Beratungsgruppen-Projekte - Ein Tag der Arbeit in einem Laden, um echte Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Netzwerkmöglichkeiten mit Gleichaltrigen und Senior-Management Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Praktikum zu einem Vertrag nachfolgt, aber dank dem Wert der Erfahrung bleiben die meisten unserer Praktikanten bei der Gesellschaft nach dem Praktikumszeitraum. Da wir wollen, dass du dich auf das Konzentriertesten konzentrierst, bieten wir umfassende Vorteile, die das mentale, körperliche und finanzielle Wohlbefinden fördern. Du wirst: - Hybrid-Work-Policy - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - In-House-Fitnessstudio, das Gesundheits- und Wohlbefindnisinitiativen anbietet - Subventionierte Kantine, sowie Ausgabebereiche, die kostenlose Getränke anbieten - Bus-Shuttle zur Arbeit oder Rabatt auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach Standort - Eine blühende Praktikanten-Gemeinschaft, mit Menschen aus verschiedenen Hintergründen, Lebensstilen und Nationalitäten, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. ## Frei zu sein, Inklusion und Zugehörigkeit Als gleichberechtigter Arbeitgeber streben wir eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit an, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir sind verpflichtet, eine Arbeitsumgebung zu schaffen, die die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter feiert, ihnen ermöglicht, ihre authentischen Geschichten jeden Tag ins Arbeitsleben zu bringen. ## Kontakt Bist du bereit? Klicke hier, um zu bewerben - die Früheinschreibung erhöht deine Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260206-0012
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Sois un rêveur, fais la différence ! Rejoins #VFInternshipProgram dans notre siège EMEA à Stabio, Suisse, en tant que CRM & Loyalty Stagiaire pour Vans. Sur nous VF définit ce que signifie être la meilleure société de vêtements, chaussures et équipements du monde, en alimentant des marques d'activité de mode de vie iconiques comme The North Face?, Vans? et Timberland?. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com. ## Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1'850 CHF - Emplacement : Siège EMEA VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, cas d'affaires potentiel) ## Conditions d'admissibilité - Vous devez avoir terminé vos études après le 1er mai 2026 OU vous devez avoir un statut d'étudiant à juin 2026 - Vous devez avoir la nationalité de l'UE ou de l'Espace économique européen ## Tâches Vans recherche un stagiaire CRM & Loyalty motivé et engagé pour soutenir comment nous engageons, récompensons et développons notre communauté de consommateurs en EMEA, basée à Stabio, Suisse. Soutenez l'exécution de la stratégie CRM et de la fidélité de Vans en EMEA, en contribuant à comment nous engageons notre communauté, renforçons la fidélité et portons la marque Vans à la vie à travers des expériences significatives, guidées par les données des consommateurs. Vous acquérez une connaissance de première main des stratégies de marketing de cycle de vie, des mécanismes de fidélité et de la collaboration interfonctionnelle dans un marché global, guidé par la culture de la jeunesse. - Soutenez l'exécution des campagnes CRM en E-mail, E-commerce et autres points de contact des consommateurs, en assurant la cohérence de la marque et la livraison impeccable - Contribuez à la configuration, au suivi et à l'optimisation des activités de fidélité pour stimuler l'engagement, la conservation et la valeur des membres - Gérez et mettez à jour les actifs CRM comme calendriers de campagnes, notes, fichiers de suivi et tableaux de bord pour soutenir l'exécution quotidienne - Soyez responsable du soutien à la relation et à l'analyse post-campagne, en aidant à traduire les données des consommateurs et les insights en actions significatives - Développez une compréhension solide du consommateur Vans, de la mentalité de la communauté et des phases de cycle de vie en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec les équipes EMEA et centrales - Soutenez des initiatives de médias numériques supplémentaires et des projets comme partie de l'équipe de planification de la marque Vans ## Exigences Ce qui vous rendra un succès dans ce rôle : - Une forte passion pour la marque Vans, la culture de la jeunesse et le marketing communautaire guidé, avec curiosité sur comment les marques construisent des relations à long terme - Un intérêt sincère pour le CRM, les programmes de fidélité et la prise de décision informée par les données, au-delà de la simple exécution des campagnes - Un mindset analytique, avec la capacité de relier les données de performance aux comportements des consommateurs et à l'impact de la marque - Une grande attention aux détails et à la structure, essentiels pour gérer plusieurs campagnes et parties prenantes en parallèle - Un attitude proactive, de première main, confortable dans un environnement international rapide et apprendre en faisant - Un diplôme en marketing, commerce, économie, données ou un domaine connexe est agréable ## Ce que nous offrons En tant que stagiaire CRM & Loyalty, vous travaillerez au cœur de la stratégie d'engagement des consommateurs de Vans, acquérant une connaissance de première main des stratégies de marketing de cycle de vie, des mécanismes de fidélité et de la collaboration interfonctionnelle dans un marché global, guidé par la culture de la jeunesse. En rejoignant notre équipe, vous obtiendrez : - Une expérience pratique du CRM, de la fidélité et du marketing de cycle de vie, en travaillant sur des campagnes réelles qui atteignent des millions de consommateurs en EMEA - Apprenez à traduire les données des consommateurs et les insights en actions significatives qui stimulent l'engagement, la conservation et l'amour de la marque - Développez une compréhension solide de la famille Vans, des mécanismes de fidélité et de comment les marques communautaires créent de la valeur au-delà des transactions - Travaillez en étroite collaboration avec une équipe internationale et interfonctionnelle, en travaillant avec la marque, le numérique, le commerce électronique et les équipes CRM centrales - Construisez la confiance en l'utilisation d'outils et de processus de leader de l'industrie, avec accès à l'exécution des campagnes, à la relation et à l'optimisation des performances - Profitez d'un environnement d'apprentissage soutenu, comprenant l'apprentissage sur le lieu de travail, les retours d'expérience et les opportunités de réseau au sein des équipes et des marques au sein de VF Ce stage offre une opportunité unique de faire l'apprentissage, d'élargir votre spectre d'aptitudes et de contribuer à déterminer comment Vans se connecte avec sa communauté - toujours "Hors les murs". Le programme de stages EMEA de VF est un parcours de 12 mois conçu pour développer et renforcer les talents émergents au début de leur carrière. Nous sommes engagés à libérer votre potentiel, donc vous pouvez attendre un parcours d'apprentissage structuré et une expérience de première main riche, comprenant : - Ateliers de formation dédiés & groupe de conseil interne - Un jour de travail dans un magasin pour acquérir des connaissances réelles sur nos marques - Opportunités de réseau avec des pairs et des dirigeants seniors Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage conduira à un contrat ultérieur, mais grâce à la valeur de l'expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans la société après la période de stage. Puisque nous voulons que vous vous concentriez sur ce qui compte, nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Vous bénéficierez de : - Politique de travail hybride - 50% de remise sur les marques VF - Gym en site, offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Cantine subventionnée, ainsi que des zones de pause offrant des boissons gratuites - Bus-Shuttle pour le travail ou remise sur les transports publics, en fonction de votre emplacement - Une communauté de stagiaires en floraison, avec des personnes de diverses origines, styles de vie et nationalités qui aiment travailler ensemble. ## Libre à être, Inclusion et appartenance En tant qu'employeur égal, nous visons à créer une culture d'appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'autenticité. Nous sommes engagés à créer un environnement de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos employés, leur permettant de porter leurs histoires authentiques au travail chaque jour. ## Contact Es-tu prêt ? Cliquez ici pour postuler - l'avance de la date d'inscription augmente vos chances ! #readytoapply R-20260206-0012

jobs.title: Product Merchandising Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Product Merchandising Intern for The North Face . About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! As a Product Merchandising Intern you will support the end-to-end product lifecycle by translating market insights into compelling assortments that drive sales and brand growth. Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure the right product is in the right place at the right time, maximizing customer impact and business performance. - Support the SMU (Special Make Up) line planning process by analyzing consumer insights, sales performance, and market trends to inform the FW/SS assortment strategy for Europe. - Coordinate the go-to-market process by managing timelines, tools, and product data accuracy to ensure seamless cross-functional alignment. - Monitor in-season product performance to identify risks and opportunities, providing actionable recommendations to optimize sell-through and margin. - Collaborate with global and regional teams to ensure correct data flows into the systems & assortments reflect brand direction while meeting local market needs and commercial goals. - Contribute to visual line reviews and product presentations by supporting the preparation of compelling tools. - Support data entry of PLM (Product Lifecycle Management) systems, support with transfer from PLM to Flex and update linelists to reflect correct information How you will make a difference To succeed as an Associate Product Merchandising Intern, you should be curious about products, eager to learn how assortments are built, and ready to support a fast-paced team with energy and precision. We are looking for someone who has demonstrated: - The ability to work with numbers and draw simple conclusions to support product decisions. - The capability to stay organized and manage multiple tasks with attention to detail. - A team player. Working x functionally is essential as a assistant product merchandiser. - An understanding of what makes a product appealing to consumers , especially in the European market. - Eye for detail to ensure accuracy across the tools & PLM systems - A basic knowledge of Excel or similar tools to help with data and product tracking. - A keen interest in fashion, retail, or product creation , and a desire to grow in this field. - A positive, can-do attitude , and a willingness to support the team wherever needed. What’s in it For You By joining our team, you will: - Learn how to build and manage a seasonal product line , from concept to market launch. - Gain exposure to real-time business decisions , using data to support product and commercial strategies. - Understand the role of merchandising within a global brand , and how it connects with marketing, sales, and product teams. - Develop your analytical and storytelling skills , turning numbers into product narratives. - Build a strong professional network , with opportunities to connect across teams, functions, and brands. - Receive mentorship and training , helping you grow your confidence and capabilities in a dynamic, international environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership In this internship, you’ll gain hands-on experience in how seasonal assortments are built and brought to life across the European market. You’ll work closely with experienced merchandisers, gaining exposure to product strategy, consumer insights, and cross-functional collaboration. We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0020

titleByLocale.en: Product Merchandising Intern - EMEA Internship Program
titleByLocale.it: Intern di Merchandising Prodotti - Programma di Tirocinio EMEA

descriptionByLocale.it: Sogna in grande, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram nella nostra sede EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera, come Intern di Merchandising Prodotti per The North Face. Su VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda al mondo nel settore abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature, supportando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo come The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com. Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1° giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, tempo pieno - Stipendio lordo mensile: 1'850 CHF - Luogo: Sede EMEA di VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di selezione semplificato: 3 interviste (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenziale Business Case) Requisiti di idoneità - Devi laurearti dopo il 1° maggio 2026 O devi avere la qualifica di studente fino a giugno 2026 - Devi essere cittadino dell'UE o dell'Area Economica Europea (AEE) Parliamo del ruolo! Come Intern di Merchandising Prodotti supporterai il ciclo di vita completo del prodotto traducendo le insight di mercato in assortimenti convincenti che generano vendite e crescita del brand. Collabora in modo trasversale per garantire che il prodotto giusto sia nel posto giusto al momento giusto, massimizzando l'impatto sui clienti e le prestazioni aziendali. - Supporta il processo di pianificazione della linea SMU (Special Make Up) analizzando insight dei consumatori, performance delle vendite e tendenze di mercato per informare la strategia di assortimento FW/SS per l'Europa. - Coordina il processo di lancio sul mercato gestendo tempi, strumenti e accuratezza dei dati del prodotto per garantire un'allineamento trasversale senza intoppi. - Monitora le performance dei prodotti in stagione per identificare rischi e opportunità, fornendo raccomandazioni operative per ottimizzare la vendita e il margine. - Collabora con team globali e regionali per garantire il corretto flusso dei dati nei sistemi e che gli assortimenti riflettano la direzione del brand rispettando le esigenze del mercato locale e gli obiettivi commerciali. - Contribuisci a revisioni visive delle linee e presentazioni prodotto supportando la preparazione di strumenti convincenti. - Supporta l'inserimento dei dati nei sistemi PLM (Product Lifecycle Management), supporta il trasferimento da PLM a Flex e aggiorna le liste di prodotto per riflettere informazioni corrette. Come farai la differenza Per riuscire come Intern di Merchandising Prodotti, devi essere curioso dei prodotti, desideroso di imparare come vengono costruiti gli assortimenti e pronto a supportare un team dinamico con energia e precisione. Cerchiamo qualcuno che abbia dimostrato: - La capacità di lavorare con i numeri e trarre conclusioni semplici per supportare decisioni sui prodotti. - La capacità di rimanere organizzato e gestire molteplici compiti con attenzione ai dettagli. - Essere una persona team player. Lavorare in modo trasversale è essenziale come assistente al merchandising. - Una comprensione di ciò che rende attraente un prodotto per i consumatori, specialmente nel mercato europeo. - Occhio per i dettagli per garantire l'accuratezza degli strumenti e dei sistemi PLM. - Conoscenze di base di Excel o strumenti simili per aiutare nella tracciabilità dei dati e dei prodotti. - Un interesse vivace per la moda, il retail o la creazione di prodotti, e il desiderio di crescere in questo settore. - Un atteggiamento positivo e can-do, e la volontà di supportare il team ovunque necessario. Cosa ti offriamo Unendoti al nostro team, imparerai a costruire e gestire una linea di prodotti stagionali, dal concetto al lancio sul mercato. - Guadagnerai esperienza in decisioni aziendali in tempo reale, utilizzando dati per supportare strategie prodotto e commerciali. - Capirai il ruolo del merchandising in un brand globale e come si collega con marketing, vendite e team prodotto. - Svilupperai le tue capacità analitiche e di storytelling, trasformando i numeri in narrazioni prodotto. - Costruirai una rete professionale solida, con opportunità di connessione tra team, funzioni e marchi. - Riceverai mentoring e formazione, aiutandoti a crescere in sicurezza e capacità in un ambiente dinamico e internazionale. Il Programma di Tirocinio EMEA di VF è un percorso di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e potenziare i talenti emergenti all'inizio della loro carriera. Siamo impegnati a sfruttare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e un'esperienza hands-on ricca, inclusa: - Workshop dedicati allo sviluppo delle competenze e progetto interno di consulenza - Un giorno di lavoro in negozio per ottenere insight reali sui nostri marchi - Opportunità di networking con pari e leadership senior In questo tirocinio, guadagnerai esperienza pratica su come vengono costruiti e portati a vita gli assortimenti stagionali nel mercato europeo. Lavorerai a stretto contatto con merchandiser esperti, acquisendo esperienza su strategia prodotto, insight dei consumatori e collaborazione trasversale. Non possiamo garantire che il tirocinio porterà a un contratto successivo, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri tirocinanti rimane in azienda dopo il periodo di tirocinio. Poiché vogliamo che tu possa concentrarti su ciò che conta, offriamo benefici completi che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Godrai di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui marchi VF - Palestra in sede, che offre iniziative per la salute e il benessere - Mensa sussidiata, nonché aree di sosta con bevande gratuite - Autobus navetta per l'ufficio o sconto sui mezzi pubblici, a seconda della tua posizione - Una comunità di tirocinanti vivace, con persone di diverse provenienze, stili di vita e nazionalità che amano lavorare insieme. Libertà di Essere, Inclusione & Appartenenza Come datore di lavoro che garantisce pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a coltivare una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, la connessione, l'apertura e l'autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un ambiente di lavoro che celebri la diversità dei nostri associati, permettendo loro di portare la loro autenticità al lavoro ogni giorno. Sei pronto?
descriptionByLocale.de: Träume groß, mach den Unterschied! Melde dich beim #VFInternshipProgram an und werde Produkt-Merchandising-Praktikant:in bei The North Face an der EMEA-Zentrale in Stabio, Schweiz. Über VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, die beste Bekleidungs-, Schuh- und Ausrüstungsfirma der Welt zu sein, und unterstützt ikonische Marken aktiver Lebensstil wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland®. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com. Wichtige Informationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttolohn pro Monat: 1'850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA-Zentrale in Stabio, Schweiz - Vereinfachter Rekrutierungsprozess: 3 Interviews (Rekrutierer, Hiring Manager, möglicher Business Case) Eignungsvoraussetzungen - Sie müssen nach dem 1. Mai 2026 abschließen ODER Sie müssen zum 1. Juni 2026 Student:in sein - Sie müssen EU- oder EWR-Bürger:in (Europäischer Wirtschaftsraum) sein Lassen Sie uns über die Rolle sprechen! Als Produkt-Merchandising-Praktikant:in unterstützen Sie den gesamten Produktlebenszyklus, indem Sie Marktinsights in überzeugende Sortimente übersetzen, die Verkäufe und Marktwachstum antreiben. Arbeiten Sie fachübergreifend zusammen, um das richtige Produkt zum richtigen Zeitpunkt am richtigen Ort zu platzieren, um den Kundenimpact und die Geschäftsleistung zu maximieren. - Unterstützen Sie den Planungsprozess der SMU-Linie (Special Make Up), indem Sie Konsumenteninsights, Verkaufsleistungen und Markttrends analysieren, um die FW/SS-Sortimentsstrategie für Europa zu informieren. - Koordinieren Sie den Go-to-Market-Prozess, indem Sie Termine, Tools und Produktdatenakuratesität verwalten, um eine reibungslose fachübergreifende Ausrichtung zu gewährleisten. - Beobachten Sie die in-Season-Produktleistung, um Risiken und Chancen zu identifizieren und handlungsorientierte Empfehlungen zur Optimierung der Verkaufsquote und des Margins zu geben. - Arbeiten Sie mit globalen und regionalen Teams zusammen, um die korrekte Datenfluss in die Systeme und Sortimente sicherzustellen, die die Markenrichtung widerspiegeln und lokale Marktnachfragen und kommerzielle Ziele erfüllen. - Tragen Sie zu visuellen Linienüberprüfungen und Produktpräsentationen bei, indem Sie die Vorbereitung überzeugender Tools unterstützen. - Unterstützen Sie die Dateneingabe in PLM-Systeme (Product Lifecycle Management), unterstützen Sie den Transfer von PLM zu Flex und aktualisieren Sie Linienlisten, um korrekte Informationen widerzuspiegeln. Wie Sie den Unterschied machen Um als Associate Produkt-Merchandising-Praktikant:in erfolgreich zu sein, sollten Sie neugierig auf Produkte sein, bereit, zu lernen, wie Sortimente aufgebaut werden, und bereit, einem dynamischen Team mit Energie und Präzision zu helfen. Wir suchen jemanden, der nachgewiesen hat: - Die Fähigkeit, mit Zahlen zu arbeiten und einfache Schlussfolgerungen zu ziehen, um Produktentscheidungen zu unterstützen. - Die Fähigkeit, organisiert zu bleiben und mehrere Aufgaben mit Sorgfalt zu bewältigen. - Ein Teamplayer. Das Arbeiten fachübergreifend ist als Produkt-Merchandising-Assistent:in entscheidend. - Ein Verständnis dafür, was ein Produkt für Verbraucher attraktiv macht, insbesondere auf dem europäischen Markt. - Auge für Details, um die Genauigkeit der Tools und PLM-Systeme sicherzustellen. - Grundkenntnisse in Excel oder ähnlichen Tools, um bei der Datenerfassung und Produktverfolgung zu helfen. - Ein starkes Interesse an Mode, Einzelhandel oder Produktentwicklung und das Wunsch, sich in diesem Bereich weiterzuentwickeln. - Eine positive, can-do-Mentalität und die Bereitschaft, das Team dort zu unterstützen, wo es nötig ist. Was Sie davon haben Durch das Beitreten zu unserem Team lernen Sie, wie man eine Saisonproduktlinie aufbaut und verwaltet, von der Konzeption bis zum Markteinstieg. - Sie erhalten Einblicke in reale Geschäftsentscheidungen, indem Sie Daten nutzen, um Produkt- und Vermarktungsstrategien zu unterstützen. - Sie verstehen die Rolle des Merchandising in einem globalen Markenkontext und wie es sich mit Marketing, Vertrieb und Produktteams verbindet. - Sie entwickeln Ihre analytischen und Storytelling-Fähigkeiten, um Zahlen in Produktgeschichten umzuwandeln. - Sie bauen ein starkes professionelles Netzwerk auf, mit Möglichkeiten, sich über Teams, Funktionen und Marken zu vernetzen. - Sie erhalten Mentoring und Schulungen, die Ihnen helfen, Ihre Selbstsicherheit und Fähigkeiten in einem dynamischen, internationalen Umfeld zu stärken. Das VF EMEA-Praktikumsprogramm ist ein 12-monatiger Weg, der darauf abzielt, sich entwickelnde Talente am Anfang ihrer Karriere zu fördern und zu stärken. Wir sind bestrebt, Ihr Potenzial zu entfesseln, also können Sie sich auf einen strukturierten Lernpfad und eine reiche Praxiserfahrung freuen, einschließlich: - Workshop zur Fähigkeitsentwicklung und internen Beratungsgruppenprojekt - Einen Tag Arbeit im Geschäft, um reale Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Vernetzungsmöglichkeiten mit Kolleg:innen und Führungskräften In diesem Praktikum sammeln Sie praktische Erfahrung darin, wie Saison-Sortimente im europäischen Markt aufgebaut und zum Leben erweckt werden. Sie arbeiten eng mit erfahrenen Merchandiser:innen zusammen und erhalten Einblicke in Produktstrategie, Konsumenteninsights und fachübergreifende Zusammenarbeit. Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Praktikum zu einem Vertrag führt, aber dank des Wertes der Erfahrung bleiben die meisten unserer Praktikant:innen nach dem Praktikumszeitraum bei der Firma. Da wir möchten, dass Sie sich auf das Wesentliche konzentrieren können, bieten wir umfassende Vorteile an, die geistige, körperliche und finanzielle Wohlbefinden fördern. Sie genießen: - Hybride Arbeitszeiten - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - On-site-Gym, das Gesundheits- und Wohlbefinden-Initiativen anbietet - Subventioniertes Kantinenessen sowie Ausklinkbereiche mit kostenlosen Getränken - Shuttle-Bus zum Büro oder Rabatt auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach Ihrem Standort - Eine lebendige Praktikant:innen-Community mit Menschen unterschiedlicher Hintergründe, Lebensstilen und Nationalitäten, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. Frei zu Sein, Inklusion & Zugehörigkeit Als Arbeitgeber mit Chancengleichheit streben wir an, eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit zu fördern, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir sind uns verpflichtet, einen Arbeitsplatz zu schaffen und zu erhalten, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter:innen feiert und es ihnen ermöglicht, ihre authentische Selbst in den Arbeitsalltag einzubringen. Seid ihr dabei? Bewerbt euch jetzt – eine frühe Bewerbung erhöht eure Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260209-0020
descriptionByLocale.fr: Rêve en grand, fais la différence ! Rejoins le #VFInternshipProgram à notre siège EMEA à Stabio, Suisse, en tant que Stagiaire Merchandising Produits pour The North Face. À propos de VF VF redéfinit ce qu'il signifie d'être le meilleur fabricant mondial de vêtements, chaussures et équipements, en soutenant des marques emblématiques de mode active comme The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com. Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire brut mensuel : 1'850 CHF - Lieu : Siège EMEA de VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Responsable de l'embauche, cas d'entreprise potentiel) Critères d'éligibilité - Vous devez obtenir votre diplôme après le 1er mai 2026 OU vous devez être étudiant·e au 1er juin 2026 - Vous devez être citoyen·ne de l'UE ou de l'EEE (Espace Économique Européen) Parlons du rôle ! En tant que Stagiaire Merchandising Produits, vous soutenez le cycle de vie complet du produit en traduisant les insights du marché en assortiments convaincants qui stimulent les ventes et la croissance de la marque. Collaborez transversalement pour garantir que le bon produit se trouve au bon endroit au bon moment, maximisant l'impact client et les performances commerciales. - Soutenez le processus de planification de la ligne SMU (Special Make Up) en analysant les insights des consommateurs, les performances des ventes et les tendances du marché pour informer la stratégie d'assortiment FW/SS pour l'Europe. - Coordinez le processus d'entrée sur le marché en gérant les délais, les outils et l'exactitude des données produit pour assurer une alignement transversal sans heurt. - Surveillez les performances des produits en saison pour identifier les risques et les opportunités, en fournissant des recommandations opérationnelles pour optimiser la rotation des stocks et la marge. - Collaborez avec les équipes globales et régionales pour garantir le bon flux de données dans les systèmes et que les assortiments reflètent la direction de la marque tout en répondant aux besoins locaux du marché et aux objectifs commerciaux. - Contribuez aux révisions visuelles des lignes et aux présentations de produits en soutenant la préparation d'outils convaincants. - Soutenez l'entrée des données dans les systèmes PLM (Product Lifecycle Management), soutenez le transfert de PLM à Flex et mettez à jour les listes de lignes pour refléter des informations correctes. Comment vous ferez la différence Pour réussir en tant qu'Associé(e) Stagiaire Merchandising Produits, vous devez être curieux(se) des produits, désireux(se) d'apprendre comment les assortiments sont construits et prêt(e) à soutenir une équipe dynamique avec énergie et précision. Nous recherchons quelqu'un qui a démontré : - La capacité de travailler avec des chiffres et d'en tirer des conclusions simples pour soutenir les décisions sur les produits. - La capacité de rester organisé(e) et de gérer plusieurs tâches avec attention aux détails. - Être une personne d'équipe. Travailler en mode transverse est essentiel en tant qu'assistant(e) merchandising. - Une compréhension de ce qui rend un produit attrayant pour les consommateurs, surtout sur le marché européen. - Un œil pour les détails pour garantir l'exactitude des outils et des systèmes PLM. - Une connaissance de base d'Excel ou d'outils similaires pour aider à la traçabilité des données et des produits. - Un intérêt vif pour la mode, le retail ou la création de produits, et le désir de progresser dans ce domaine. - Une attitude positive et can-do, et la volonté de soutenir l'équipe là où c'est nécessaire. Qu'obtiendrez-vous en y participant En rejoignant notre équipe, vous apprendrez à construire et à gérer une ligne de produits saisonnière, de la conception au lancement sur le marché. - Vous gagnerez de l'expérience dans des décisions commerciales en temps réel, en utilisant des données pour soutenir les stratégies produit et commerciales. - Vous comprendrez le rôle du merchandising au sein d'une marque mondiale, et comment il se connecte avec le marketing, les ventes et les équipes produit. - Vous développerez vos compétences analytiques et en storytelling, en transformant les chiffres en récits produit. - Vous construirez un réseau professionnel solide, avec des opportunités de connexion entre équipes, fonctions et marques. - Vous recevrez du mentorat et de la formation, vous aidant à développer votre confiance et vos capacités dans un environnement dynamique et international. Le Programme de Stages EMEA de VF est un parcours de 12 mois conçu pour développer et renforcer les talents émergents au début de leur carrière. Nous sommes engagés à libérer votre potentiel, donc vous pouvez vous attendre à un parcours d'apprentissage structuré et à une expérience pratique riche, incluant : - Ateliers dédiés au développement des compétences et projet interne de conseil - Une journée de travail en magasin pour obtenir des insights réels sur nos marques - Des opportunités de networking avec des pairs et des dirigeants Dans ce stage, vous gagnerez une expérience pratique sur la manière dont les assortiments saisonniers sont construits et mis en œuvre sur le marché européen. Vous travaillerez étroitement avec des merchandisers expérimentés, gagnant en expérience sur la stratégie produit, les insights des consommateurs et la collaboration transversale. Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage conduira à un contrat ultérieur, mais grâce à la valeur de l'expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l'entreprise après la période de stage. Puisque nous voulons que vous puissiez vous concentrer sur ce qui compte, nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Vous profiterez de : - Politique de travail hybride - Réduction de 50 % sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur site, offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Restaurant subventionné, ainsi que des espaces de détente avec boissons gratuites - Navette vers le bureau ou réduction sur les transports en commun, selon votre lieu - Une communauté dynamique de stagiaires, avec des personnes de diverses origines, modes de vie et nationalités qui aiment travailler ensemble. Libre d'être, Inclusion & Appartenance En tant qu'employeur engagé dans l'égalité des chances, nous nous engageons à cultiver une culture d'appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'authenticité. Nous sommes déterminés à construire et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos associés, leur permettant de ramener leur authenticité au travail chaque jour. Es-tu prêt ? Postule maintenant – une candidature précoce augmente tes chances ! #readytoapply R-20260209-0020

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Creative Designer Intern for The North Face. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) - Please make sure to upload both a CV and a portfolio ! Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for Retail Creative Designer Intern to contribute to creative research, concept development, and graphic design for our The North Face retail spaces. The intern will work closely with the team to transform ideas into visual and spatial concepts, supporting projects from inspiration to execution. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail Creative Designer Intern for: - Developing 2D graphic layouts for brand campaign storytelling that engages, informs, and inspires our consumers - Design POP and strut cards for in store communication (for campaigns, promotions, special communications) - Co-work with 3D designer for the creative proposal for window & instore campaign execution. - Supporting for the design of graphic identity for retail activations and special events - Supporting the design of flagships executions and adapting window & instore executions for special locations. - Hoarding graphics design for new store openings - Support the development of new creative ideas like wall customisations, creation of corners and study new design elements to inject in our new stores TNF brand DNA as briefed by Retail Architects. - Support retail adaptations for Wholesale stores - Support the creation of the monthly retail marketing newsletter How you will make a difference - A degree in design, product design, interior design, architecture, or graphic design - Proficiency in 2D and 3D software for graphic design and modelling - Strong creativity in graphic design and concept development - Proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) - Passion for creative research and innovation in graphic design and spatial development - Ability to envision and create compelling concepts, from mood boards to full spatial designs - Excellent attention to detail and team collaboration skills - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills Curious mindset with passion for working with people What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: • Project coordination • Retail marketing principles • How to elevate brand representation instore • Manage retail marketing database (instore and window pictures, measurements, floor plans) • You will be expose to all the retail marketing team members, learning key principles of retail architectures, visual merchandising, retail activations and creative environment The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. - Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260210-0017

jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Allocator Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to turn data-driven decisions into winning retail strategies? Timberland is looking for a Retail Allocator intern to play a key role in ensuring the right product reaches the right store at the right time across EMEA. Support the allocation and replenishment of product to our EMEA retail stores by analysing sales trends, monitoring inventory levels, and ensuring accurate product flow to stores. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail allocator intern: - Report updating. - Manual allocation to stores. - Track stock levels, sales trends, and store performance to identify risks and opportunities, recommending adjustments to maximize in-season results. - Initial allocation set-up - Ad hoc analysis on products / performance. - Promotions upload in the system. - Warehouse logics and interaction. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You enjoy working with data and transforming numbers into clear, meaningful insights that support better decision‑making across Allocation & Planning - You have strong problem‑solving skills , and you naturally look for patterns, root causes, and opportunities to improve processes. - You are detail‑oriented yet able to zoom out , balancing accuracy with a good understanding of the bigger commercial picture. - You are proactive and comfortable taking ownership , even when facing new or ambiguous tasks—your initiative helps move projects forward. - You are curious and eager to learn new tools , especially analytics platforms, reporting environments, and product systems (no prior expertise needed—just motivation). What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Deep understanding of retail environment across Europe - Interactions across the different department (planning, allocation, merchandising, operations, marketing) - Understand main logic of a specific category allocation, giving inputs on product needs. - Understand the differences across countries in regards to product trends. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260204-0003

descriptionByLocale.it: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Allocator Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to turn data-driven decisions into winning retail strategies? Timberland is looking for a Retail Allocator intern to play a key role in ensuring the right product reaches the right store at the right time across EMEA. Support the allocation and replenishment of product to our EMEA retail stores by analysing sales trends, monitoring inventory levels, and ensuring accurate product flow to stores. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail allocator intern: - Report updating. - Manual allocation to stores. - Track stock levels, sales trends, and store performance to identify risks and opportunities, recommending adjustments to maximize in-season results. - Initial allocation set-up - Ad hoc analysis on products / performance. - Promotions upload in the system. - Warehouse logics and interaction. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You enjoy working with data and transforming numbers into clear, meaningful insights that support better decision‑making across Allocation & Planning - You have strong problem‑solving skills , and you naturally look for patterns, root causes, and opportunities to improve processes. - You are detail‑oriented yet able to zoom out , balancing accuracy with a good understanding of the bigger commercial picture. - You are proactive and comfortable taking ownership , even when facing new or ambiguous tasks—your initiative helps move projects forward. - You are curious and eager to learn new tools , especially analytics platforms, reporting environments, and product systems (no prior expertise needed—just motivation). What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Deep understanding of retail environment across Europe - Interactions across the different department (planning, allocation, merchandising, operations, marketing) - Understand main logic of a specific category allocation, giving inputs on product needs. - Understand the differences across countries in regards to product trends. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260204-0003

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Trading Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Become the engine behind our Digital Trading performance. Step into a fast‑paced, data‑driven environment where your work will directly elevate how consumers shop our brand across eCommerce and Digital Marketplace partners. You will support and coordinate day‑to‑day digital trading activities to maximize visibility, conversion, and revenue across our owned eCommerce platforms and Digital Marketplace partners. Drive actionable insights, ensure flawless execution, and help optimize performance levers to accelerate digital growth. Furthermore, you will: - Monitor and update daily trading performance dashboards, surfacing insights that support decision‑making. - Support building and executing trading calendar and provide weekly/monthly updates to the extended cross-functional team. - Assist in demand & inventory reviews , helping identify risks and opportunities across key accounts and categories. - Conduct competitive benchmarking , identifying trends, best sellers, gaps, and potential growth levers. - Lead or support additional cross‑functional projects within the Digital Trading team to drive continuous improvement and operational excellence. How you will make a difference - Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate numbers into clear, actionable insights. - Curiosity for digital commerce, performance optimization, and online consumer behavior. - Attention to detail and a proactive approach to spotting issues before they become problems. - Comfort with fast‑paced environments, managing multiple tasks while keeping quality high. - Ability to collaborate effectively across teams such as merchandising, planning, marketing, and digital operations. - Problem‑solving attitude, always looking for smarter, more efficient ways of working. What’s in it for you - Hands‑on experience in Digital Trading , one of the fastest‑growing areas in the retail & brand ecosystem. - Exposure to eCommerce and Marketplace operations , from onsite execution to performance analysis. - Practical knowledge of performance metrics , dashboards, and commercial KPIs used by leading digital retailers. - Experience working cross‑functionally with merchandising, planning, marketing, and digital operations teams. - The opportunity to contribute to real‑world digital initiatives, building a strong foundation for a future career in digital retail, eCommerce, or marketplace management. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in?
